metadata.title: Gazetta — Composable CMS
metadata.description: A stateless CMS that structures websites as composable fragments. All state lives in targets.

content.title: Welcome to Gazetta
content.subtitle: A stateless CMS that composes pages from reusable components

content.title: Fast
content.description: Edge composition at request time. No full rebuilds.

content.title: Composable
content.description: Build pages from reusable fragments. Recursive composition.

content.title: Open Source
content.description: No vendor lock-in. Use any framework for templates.

content.heading: Vue SSR Works
content.body: This component is rendered with Vue 3 SSR

content.heading: Get Started Today
content.text: Build beautiful sites with composable fragments
